subcodes.title: Some Answered Questions #013 Commentary on the Twelfth Chapter of the Revelation of John
subcodes.first_line: We have explained before that what the sacred scriptures most often mean by the Holy City
subcodes.first_line_orig: از پیش گذشت که مراد از شهر مقدس و اورشلیم الهی در کتب مقدسه
